creator: yoshiaki@kt.rim.or.jp
text:
>>>>> In <3394CE48.794BDF32@cs.berkeley.edu> 
>>>>>	Satoshi Asami <asami@cs.berkeley.edu> wrote:

 > Why is this port have NO_PACKAGE set?

In README of Pari-GP packages:

  It can be freely copied and spread, as long as no files are modified, and
  that the whole package (source and manual), including this README file
  is included.

We can distribute Pari-GP original package and patch files.
But if it is binary pacage only , we can't.

If we want to distribute binary package, we must distribute  both
binary packages and original packages.
----
  yoshiaki@kt.rim.or.jp
